ui.launchNotice.body: Thank you for using LearnKit. I have thoroughly enjoyed building this over the last few months, and I am excited to release version 1.1.0.
ui.launchNotice.body.versionSummary: Version 1.1.0 is our biggest update so far. It introduces companion, our AI learning companion, with a bring-your-own-key model. This model allows it to be included for all users and not locked behind subscriptions or paywalls.
ui.launchNotice.changes.item1: Improved reading view rendering and consistency.
ui.launchNotice.changes.item2: Grading duration visibility - can be turned on in settings, allowing you to see the duration between reviews.
ui.launchNotice.changes.item3: Improved image occlusion editing, including ocr-powered auto-masking.
ui.launchNotice.closing.p1: There may be teething issues as 1.1.0 rolls out. Please report bugs and feedback on GitHub so we can improve quickly.
ui.launchNotice.closing.p2: We remain committed to keeping LearnKit open source and accessible.
ui.launchNotice.closing.p3: If LearnKit is helping you, please share it with friends who might benefit too. Thank you again for being here.
ui.launchNotice.freeSetup.step1: Create an account at openrouter.ai. A free plan is available.
ui.launchNotice.freeSetup.step2: Generate an API key in your openrouter dashboard.
ui.launchNotice.freeSetup.step3: In LearnKit settings, set provider to openrouter.
ui.launchNotice.freeSetup.step4: We recommend setting the model to auto router.
ui.launchNotice.freeSetup.step6: You are ready to start using companion!
ui.launchNotice.releaseNotes.label: Release notes
ui.launchNotice.security.body: Your API keys are stored in local plugin data files ({configPath}). If you use Git in your vault, make sure plugin data files are ignored in .gitignore before pushing to GitHub. If you do not sync that folder with Git, this is not an issue.
ui.launchNotice.setup.intro: Companion is not ready out of the box. You will need to connect an AI provider first.
ui.launchNotice.setup.step1: Open LearnKit settings and go to companion.
ui.launchNotice.setup.step2: Choose your provider. It works with free providers (for example, google and openrouter) and premium providers (for example, anthropic and openai).
ui.launchNotice.setup.step3: Choose the AI model from the provider that you want to use. This updates dynamically, and some models may return errors. If this happens, try a different model or raise an issue on GitHub.
ui.launchNotice.setup.step5: Open companion from the command palette using 'open study companion widget', or from the companion modal button in the bottom-right of your notes. You can adjust this button's visibility in settings.
ui.launchNotice.title: LearnKit 1.1.0
